basic_details.job_title: NRLM Karnataka Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Block Manager, Cluster Supervisor and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: National Rural Livelihoods Mission Karnataka (NRLM Karnataka)
basic_details.post_name: Block Technical Coordinator – Enterprise Promotion OSF, Cluster Supervisor - Skill, Block Manager - Farm Livelihoods
basic_details.short_information: National Rural Livelihoods Mission Karnataka (NRLM Karnataka) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 5 Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate in Management, Commerce, or Engineering, Any Graduation, M.Sc. (Agri) / B.Sc. (Agri) / Master degree in farm livelihoods
qualification.details: Block Technical Coordinator – Enterprise Promotion OSF: Post Graduate in Management, Commerce, or Engineering from an institution of repute. Preference will be given to Young Professionals who have served in NRLM with any Post Graduation. Cluster Supervisor - Skill: Any Graduation Block Manager - Farm Livelihoods: M.Sc. (Agri) and allied sciences of farm sector with minimum 01 years of field level work experience in relevant field or B.Sc. (Agri) and allied sciences of farm sector with minimum 03 years of field level work experience in relevant field or Any other Master degree with minimum 05 years of field level work experience in farm livelihoods or relevant field.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Block Technical Coordinator – Enterprise Promotion OSF

salary_details.details: Block Technical Coordinator – Enterprise Promotion OSF: Rs. 42000 Per Month Cluster Supervisor - Skill: Rs. 18000 Per Month Block Manager - Farm Livelihoods: Rs. 25000 Per Month

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NRLM Karnataka Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NRLM Karnataka to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NRLM Karnataka Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the NRLM Karnataka Recruitment 2026 is 05 June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in NRLM Karnataka Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for various posts under the NRLM Karnataka Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 45 years for all the posts announced in this recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for NRLM Karnataka Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for any category. All candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: Qualifications vary by post, including Post Graduate degrees in Management, Commerce, or Engineering, Any Graduation, and specific Master's degrees in farm livelihoods.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary range for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 18,000 to Rs. 42,000 per month, depending on the specific post and responsibilities.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the NRLM Karnataka Recruitment 2026 is strictly online through the official website.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions offered under this recruitment are contractual in nature.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed via the 'Official Notification PDF' link in the Important Links section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. Which city is mentioned in the job notification?
faq.answer: The city mentioned in the job notification is Ballari, Karnataka.
